title: T-012 — /api/oee/heatmap Server endpoint + per-week MV read + cell-drill (OEE §10.2)
prompt:
# T-012 — Heatmap API endpoint

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §10.2 (Per-shift Heatmap), §11 V-OEE-ACCESS, §12.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server loader + JSON Route Handler returning per-shift heatmap data for OEE-002: one week (7 days × 3 shifts × up to 10 lines = max 210 cells) sourced from `oee_shift_metrics` MV. Includes cell-drill endpoint returning detailed A/P/Q metrics for a single (line, day, shift) triple. Performance target P95 < 2s per §10.2.

## Pre-flight
Read Wave1 T-125 `withOrgContext`, T-121 rate-limit, T-117 tracer; existing API pattern; oee_shift_metrics MV (T-006).

## Implementation contract
1. Server loader `apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/loader.ts`: accepts `weekStart: ISO date`, `lineFilter?: string[]`; reads oee_shift_metrics WHERE shift_date BETWEEN weekStart AND weekStart+6 AND org_id=app.current_org_id(); shape `{ cells: HeatmapCell[], weekStart, kpis: { factoryAvg: number, bestLine: { id, oee }, worstLine: { id, oee }, totalOutput: number } }`.
2. Cell-drill Server Action `apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/actions/cell-drill.ts`: accepts `(line_id, shift_date, shift_id)`, returns full row from oee_shift_metrics plus a gap-count from oee_snapshots (NULL slots) per cell_drill_modal contract.
3. Optional Route Handler `apps/web/app/api/oee/heatmap/route.ts` for SWR client refresh.
4. Auth: withOrgContext (Wave1 T-125), report_access_gate_v1 (V-OEE-ACCESS-2), Wave1 T-121 rate-limit (60 req/min/user), V-OEE-ACCESS-4 site_id filter via `user_sites`.
5. Observability: Wave1 T-117 trace span tagged with route, weekStart, org_id, cell_count, duration_ms; Wave1 T-118 histogram metric `oee_heatmap_load_duration_ms`.
6. Vitest: (a) 401/403 access gates, (b) RLS isolation across orgs, (c) rate-limit at 61 req/min, (d) shape ≤ 210 cells for 10 lines × 21 (day×shift) cols, (e) p95 duration < 2000ms in benchmark test against seeded MV with 1k rows.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/loader.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/actions/cell-drill.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/oee/heatmap/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(oee)/heatmap/__tests__/loader.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/oee/heatmap/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given no session, when GET /api/oee/heatmap?weekStart=2026-04-13 runs, then response is 401 (V-OEE-ACCESS-1).
2. Given valid session, when loader runs with 10 seeded lines × 21 day-shift cells, then response includes ≤ 210 cells and factoryAvg/bestLine/worstLine KPIs.
3. Given two orgs each with shift_metrics rows for week W, when withOrgContext(orgA) invokes the loader, then only orgA cells are returned (V-OEE-ACCESS-3).
4. Given 1000 seeded shift_metrics rows, when loader runs 20 times, then p95 duration < 2000 ms (§10.2 performance gate).

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee/heatmap-loader + route asserting four ACs including the perf benchmark.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/(oee)/heatmap && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run app/api/oee/heatmap`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute synchronously in request path — read from oee_shift_metrics MV only (D-OEE-1).
- Do not skip site_id filter for users with restricted `user_sites` membership (V-OEE-ACCESS-4).
- Do not bypass Wave1 T-121 rate-limit or T-117 observability.
- Do not exceed 210 cells per response — server cap; if >210 (multi-site future), paginate.
- Do not return raw oee_snapshots (per-minute) in heatmap response — use MV only for perf.

pipeline_inputs.description: Heatmap Server loader + cell-drill Server Action + Route Handler reading oee_shift_metrics with RLS + report_access_gate_v1 + rate-limit + perf gate p95 < 2s.
pipeline_inputs.details: Drives OEE-002 (T-015) and cell_drill_modal (OEE-M-007, T-015 modal). Sourced from oee_shift_metrics MV — no per-minute snapshot reads here (perf). 210-cell cap is intentional (10 lines × 21 cells per §10.2 layout).
